title: Hermes Agent just reached Fable level… Mixture Of Agents
summary: Hermes Agent is an AI agent system that has reportedly achieved Fable level performance. The video demonstrates running Hermes Agent using a mixture of agents approach on Hostinger infrastructure.
writeup: The video covers Hermes Agent, an AI agent system reported to have reached Fable level performance. It demonstrates running Hermes Agent through a mixture of agents approach deployed on Hostinger infrastructure. The takeaway is a walkthrough of the setup and the mixture of agents configuration used to reach that performance claim.
